summary: Fair-quality recording of a mixed show where an aggressive accordion player splits the audience.
review: The performance is generally regarded as good, but the guest accordionist (referred to as BH/Horsnby) draws sharp criticism for his loud, staccato playing that some feel ruins what could have been a beautiful "Broken Down Palace". Reviewers are divided on his contribution, resulting in mixed overall sentiment, and no recording‑quality details were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 4‑star reviews praising the show (despite guest issues) and one 3‑star review criticizing the guest give an average of ~3.7; limited data and no technical comments lower confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss soundboard, audience mix, or clarity; recording quality cannot be assessed from the available comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific remarks on set structure or pacing were made.
